name: Confirm Transaction
desc: Server confirms or rejects an inventory transaction from C0EPacketClickWindow.

fields.name: actionNumber
fields.desc: Action number from the click packet

fields.name: accepted
fields.desc: Whether the server accepted the click

notes: If accepted=false, the client reverts its local inventory to match the server's state by re-sending S30PacketWindowItems.

implementation.overview: Server confirms/rejects inventory transaction. Modules: Disabler (cancel/delay), Backtrack, InvManager.

modules.name: Disabler
modules.purpose: Cancel or delay S32 to prevent anti-cheat tracking.
